scenarios.description: String overload, non-null fragment and non-null context returns parsed nodes
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder) where fakeTreeBuilder.parseFragment(...) returns List.of(nodeA); using fakeTreeBuilder to isolate parsing
pseudocode: TEST TC01_O1 parseFragmentInput String overload with context

Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder); String fragment = "

test

"; Element ctx = new Element("div"); String base = "base";

scenarios.description: String overload with null fragment throws NullPointerException at StringReader constructor
pseudocode: TEST TC02_O1 parseFragmentInput String overload null-fragment
Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); String fragment = null; Element ctx = new Element("div"); String base = "base";

scenarios.description: String overload with empty fragment and null context returns empty list
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder) where fakeTreeBuilder.parseFragment(...) returns emptyList();
pseudocode: TEST TC03_O1 parseFragmentInput String overload empty-fragment
Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder); String fragment = ""; Element ctx = null; String base = "base";

scenarios.description: Reader overload, non-null context returns parsed nodes
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder) where fakeTreeBuilder.parseFragment(...) returns List.of(nodeB); using fakeTreeBuilder to isolate parsing
pseudocode: TEST TC04_O2 parseFragmentInput Reader overload with context
Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder); Reader reader = new StringReader("ok"); Element ctx = new Element("span"); String base = "base";

scenarios.description: Reader overload with null context returns parsed nodes
scenarios.precondition: Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder) where fakeTreeBuilder.parseFragment(...) returns List.of(nodeC); using fakeTreeBuilder to isolate parsing
pseudocode: TEST TC05_O2 parseFragmentInput Reader overload null context

Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder); Reader reader = new StringReader("
"); Element ctx = null; String base = "base";

scenarios.description: Reader overload when Reader throws IOException wraps into UncheckedIOException
scenarios.precondition: Reader throwingReader = stub Reader that throws IOException on read;
pseudocode: TEST TC06_O2 parseFragmentInput Reader overload io-exception
Parser parser = Parser.htmlParser(); Reader reader = throwingReader; Element ctx = new Element("p"); String base = "base";
